title: Rettai Jadai Vayasu
subTitle: While visiting his sister, a man falls in love with a local girl. Problems arise when the girl's mother objects to their alliance.

title: Manathai Thirudi Vittai
subTitle: Deva, a student from a music school, falls in love with his classmate, Shruti, and decides to marry her. However, when he remembers a mistake he made in the past, he faces a predicament.

title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Chinna Gounder
subTitle: The village head is a man who sticks to honesty while making judgements. However, when he falls prey to a conspiracy, he bravely fights to ensure that justice prevails in his village.

title: Minsara Kanna
subTitle: Indira hates men and only employs women in her company and personal staff. Kasi enters her life as a driver and soon, one by one, his entire family starts working in the same household.

title: Sigappu Rojakkal
subTitle: A young man, traumatised by his past, grows up to despise the opposite sex and exploits them. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a woman prisoner while in jail.

title: Minnale
subTitle: After falling in love with Reena who is engaged to Rajiv but never seen him, Rajesh impersonates Rajiv and wins her heart. The situation goes awry when the real Rajiv returns.

title: Puthu Vasantham
subTitle: Under certain circumstances, Gowri ends up living with four boys who are singers. But when her fiance learns of this, Sithara sets out to prove that the boys are nothing more than friends.

title: Thalapathi
subTitle: Surya, a courageous man who gets raised in the slums, fights for the rights of the poor. However, he becomes friends with Deva, who hires him as his commander and changes his life completely.

title: Uzhaippali
subTitle: A man realises that his father was killed due to a property dispute. Being the rightful heir, he strives to take revenge from the perpetuators and claim the property back.

title: Uzhaippali
subTitle: A man realises that his father was killed due to a property dispute. Being the rightful heir, he strives to take revenge from the perpetuators and claim the property back.

title: Ullathai Allitha
subTitle: Tired of his father's disciplinarian ways and to avoid marrying a girl chosen by the latter, Raja runs away to Ooty. There, he is hired as a driver by the man whose daughter he was supposed to marry.

title: Udhaya
subTitle: Udhaya falls in love with Vasanthi, but realises that she is already engaged. Later, when he is wrongly framed for a crime, she strives to prove his innocence.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Guru Sisyan
subTitle: Raja and Babu, recently out of prison, attempt to exact revenge on their prison mate on death row. They employ various methods, and the truths revealed seem to have connections to their past.

title: Naan Petha Magane
subTitle: Aandal, a possessive mother, sabotages her son's love life by attempting suicide. However, when she gets him married to a village girl, her possessiveness resurfaces.

title: Veettoda Mappillai
subTitle: While Kandasamy's two sons-in-law are useless and unemployed, Manikkam, his third son-in-law, helps him improve his hotel business. However, the return of Kandasamy's son causes trouble.

title: Rajadhi Raja
subTitle: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Varavu Ettana Selavu Pathana
subTitle: Sivaraman leads a happy life with his wife and children. However, things change when a rich politician moves into their neighbourhood and Sivaraman's wife tries to emulate their luxurious lifestyle.

title: Seval
subTitle: Murugesan lives a wayward life and earns the wrath of his father after selling his grandfather's land. He falls in love with Parijatham but an elderly man has his eyes set on her.

title: Punnagai Mannan
subTitle: Sethu and Ranjini are lovers who attempt suicide but Sethu survives and gets sent to prison for a year. Upon his release, he becomes a dance instructor where a student, Malini, falls in love with him.

title: Punnagai Mannan
subTitle: Sethu and Ranjini are lovers who attempt suicide but Sethu survives and gets sent to prison for a year. Upon his release, he becomes a dance instructor where a student, Malini, falls in love with him.

title: Mahanadhi
subTitle: An honest man, Krishnaswamy, is deceived by a chit fund scam and wrongfully imprisoned. Subsequently, as his family falls apart, he endures immense hardships in jail.

title: Mannan
subTitle: Krishnan's boss, Shanti, is an autocratic, domineering woman whom he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his mother who has paralysis and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Bakthi Neram
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
